captions.formal: A time-lapse sequence shows motion-blurred vehicles speeding through a sunlit urban intersection lined with yellow autumn trees and high-rise buildings, including a structure marked 'KOREA TECTES ENGINEERING'.
captions.sarcastic: Witness the breathtaking spectacle of cars driving through an intersection, a chaotic event carefully framed by some trees and a sign for Korea Tectes Engineering.
captions.humorous_tech: This intersection is processing traffic with the throughput of a well-optimized load balancer while the autumn leaves provide the only static assets in sight.
captions.humorous_non_tech: The cars moved so fast they turned into yellow streaks, proving that autumn is the one season where traffic actually has a need for speed.

captions.formal: A small ginger kitten walks forward from beneath low-hanging branches in a sun-dappled outdoor area, moving steadily toward the camera with a direct gaze.
captions.sarcastic: Behold the sheer audacity of a ginger kitten executing a forward locomotion strategy in the dirt.
captions.humorous_tech: This ginger kitten is deploying to production with zero testing and absolute confidence.
captions.humorous_non_tech: This tiny ginger boss is marching toward you with the confidence of someone who knows you will move.

captions.formal: A woman in a beige jacket and orange top types on a white keyboard at a desk in a modern office with glass partitions and circular ceiling lights.
captions.sarcastic: Witness the sheer audacity of a woman in a beige jacket actually using her keyboard in a modern office.
captions.humorous_tech: She is typing furiously to push a hotfix before the standup meeting realizes the main branch is on fire.
captions.humorous_non_tech: She is typing with the intensity of someone who just remembered they left the oven on, but it is probably just an email.
